index.title: Tus Neeg Txhais Lus Resource
index.description: Qhib tshuab-txhais rub thov rau cov ntaub ntawv peev txheej hauv txhua qhov repo, hauv txhua hom ntawv.
index.badge: v3.0 — Node 24, repo config, glossary, qhuav khiav
index.lede: Resource Translator qhib lub tshuab-txhais rub thov rau koj cov ntaub ntawv peev txheej siv Azure AI Translator los ntawm SDK raug cai — tsis muaj kev pabcuam ntxiv, tsuas yog kev ua haujlwm.
index.workflowTitle: Kev txhais lus raws li kev ua haujlwm, tsis yog kev ua haujlwm.
index.workflowBody: Tso qhov kev txiav txim rau hauv koj CI uas twb muaj lawm, taw tes rau Azure AI Tus Neeg Txhais Lus, thiab cia koj lub repo hais txhua hom lus koj lub hom phiaj.

formats.title: Rau cov ntaub ntawv tawm tswv yim
formats.body: Round-trips .resx, .xliff, .po, .json, .ini thiab .restext nrog byte-ruaj khov formatting.

config.title: Repo-qib config
config.body: Poob ib qho .github / resource-translator.yml rau suav nrog globs, glossaries, thiab Custom Translator pawg.

glossary.title: Glossary-paub txog
glossary.body: Xauv cov npe lag luam thiab cov ntsiab lus khoom lag luam nrog cov lus ntse-ciam teb regex uas tuav C ++, .NET thiab phooj ywg.

dryRun.title: Qhuav-khiav + mos-tsis ua hauj lwm
dryRun.body: Saib ua ntej translations tsis sau cov ntaub ntawv, los yog nto txhua qhov yuam kev raws li ib tug ceeb toom thaum koj iterate.

outputs.title: PR-phooj ywg tso zis
outputs.body: ntsiab lus-title, ntsiab lus-cov ntsiab lus, thiab muaj-tshiab-txhais lus qhov ncaj qha rau hauv tsim-rub-thov.

sdk.title: Official Azure SDK
sdk.body: Ua rau @azure-so / ai-translation-text + @azure / core-so-pipeline — tsis siv neeg rov sim ntawm 408/429/5xx, tsis muaj tes-dov HTTP. esbuild-bundled, audit-huv.

getting-started.title: Pib
getting-started.lede: Ntxiv ib tug workflow ntaub ntawv, taw tes rau koj Azure AI txhais lus cov ntawv pov thawj, thiab qhov kev txiav txim — ua nyob rau hauv Microsoft tus nom @azure-so / ai-translation-text SDK — yuav luam theej duab lub repo rau qhov chaw-lus resource ntaub ntawv thiab emit txhais cov kwv tij.

provision.title: Muab Azure AI Translator resource
provision.body: Tsim Azure AI Tus Neeg Txhais Lus cov peev txheej hauv Azure portal, tom qab ntawd khaws cov hauv qab no raws li GitHub repository secrets kom lub workflow tuaj yeem nyeem lawv:
provision.key: tus yuam sij subscription rau cov peev txheej.
provision.region: cov peev txheej Azure cheeb tsam.

resource.title: Cog lus ib qho ntaub ntawv peev txheej
resource.body: Cov ntaub ntawv resource siv lub Npe. <sourceLocale>. <ext> rooj sib tham. Piv txwv li, Greetings.en.resx dhau los ua Greetings.fr.resx, Greetings.de.resx, thiab lwm yam tom qab khiav.

output.title: Xyuas cov zis
output.body: Thaum lub workflow tiav, qhov kev txiav txim exposes peb outputs koj yuav xaim rau hauv ib tug PR piav qhia: ntsiab lus-title, ntsiab lus-ntsiab lus thiab muaj-tshiab-txhais lus. Nws kuj sau ib tug Markdown ntsiab lus rau hauv txoj hauj lwm nplooj ntawv los ntawm core.summary.

nextSteps.title: Cov kauj ruam tom ntej
nextSteps.recipes: Saib cov zaub mov txawv rau monorepos, kev cai glossaries thiab Custom Translator pawg.

configuration.title: Kev teeb tsa
configuration.lede: Qhia defaults ib zaug hauv .github/resource-translator.yml thiab cia txhua qhov kev ua haujlwm tau txais lawv. Kev nqis tes ua inputs yeej yeej thaum ob qho tib si muab.

inputs.title: Cov tswv yim & tso zis
inputs.lede: Txhua cov tswv yim kuj tau txais nyob rau hauv cov ntaub ntawv xaiv repo config. Thaum ob qho tib si tau teeb tsa, qhov kev txiav txim siab yeej yeej.

formats.title: Cov ntaub ntawv tawm tswv yim
formats.heroTitle: Txaus siab ua ntaub ntawv tawm tswv yim
formats.lede: Rau round-trippable peev txheej hom ntawv. Qhov kev nqis tes ua nyeem txhua qhov chaw-locale cov ntaub ntawv, txhais cov nqis, thiab sau ib tug kwv tij rau ib lub hom phiaj hauv zos.

recipes.title: Cov zaub mov txawv
recipes.lede: Cov qauv feem ntau rau kev xa khoom txhais lus: monorepos, glossaries, kev cai pawg, khiav qhuav thiab tone tswj.

faq.lede: Cov lus teb ceev rau cov lus nug uas tuaj txog feem ntau thaum txais yuav qhov kev ua.

contributing.lede: Cov ntawv ceeb toom kab laum, kev thov tshwj xeeb, thiab rub thov yog txhua tus txais tos. Qhov kev txiav txim yog me me txaus los ua phooj ywg rau thawj lub sij hawm contributors.
